martha.name: Martha
martha.comment: Martha, Saturday evening is looking perfect for a run - 19:00 to 21:00 is your window, with comfortable humidity and ideal temps around 16°C. Don't forget the sunscreen, though, with that high UV index. If you can drag Britt along, even better - a cold one after the run sounds like a great way to cap off the day.

britt.name: Britt
britt.comment: Britt, running looks great today, especially between 19:00–21:00 when it's a comfortable 16°C and the UV isn't too harsh. You might even drag Martha along for a sunset run. The wind is noticeable on the bike, so maybe save cycling for another day — or hit the roads early, around 06:00–08:00, when it's a bit calmer.
